Subject: Re: CR-2024-004 — quick check

Hi M,

Thanks for sending. I had a look. Overall I think it is a clean CR and sensible to add the feature given the stakeholder requests.

A few small thoughts:

- The 8 person-days estimate is reasonable.
- PM-approval is right — this feels like a Tier 1 change since it is contained within self-service.
- Good to have both A. Wong and J. Patel asking for it; suggests real demand.

For the political side, I would leverage clear stakeholder communication to ensure alignment on the change. Good communication is critical at this stage.

I think you can send it to L. today and start dev on Monday as planned. Quick and pragmatic.

Best,
PC
